rip: 7212
title: Precompile for secp256r1 Curve Support
description: Proposal to add precompiled contract that performs signature verifications in the "secp256r1" elliptic curve.
author: Ulaş Erdoğan (@ulerdogan), Doğan Alpaslan (@doganalpaslan)

created: 2023-06-22

## Abstract

This proposal creates a precompiled contract that performs signature verifications in the "secp256r1" elliptic curve by given parameters of the message hash, the r and s components of the signature, and the x and y coordinates of the public key.
